cells.t: falling — price to clear, do not accumulate
falling — price to clear, do not accumulate

analysis: Two real big-ticket flips — verified, not mirages. Masori mask (f) is the pick: buy ~19.85m (live instasell), sell 20.70m which reaches recent 3/3 at a conservative p7, +436k/u (+2.2%). Ancient godsword re-entry (a known lane): buy ~39.20m, sell 40.40m reaches recent 3/3, rising +7%, +392k/u. Both thin (size in units). The away thin-churn bids (Superior dragon bones 20,150, Divine super combat 18,400) haven't filled — no dip came in the UK evening — so they're redeploy candidates into these higher-margin big-tickets. Everything else is the usual: kisten/Armadyl crossbow are sell-0/3 mirages, plus froth spikes (Bolt of linen +240%, Adamant cannonball).
